intent_summary: Rebuild Talent Flow engine skeleton inside EXISTING hub at barton-outreach-core/hubs/talent-flow/. Recreate 2 dropped tables (talent_flow.movements, people.person_movement_history) from SCHEMA.md. Create 2 new tables (people.talent_flow_snapshot, people.talent_flow_watch). Add TALENT_FLOW source_hub and 4 new signal categories to lcs.signal_queue/signal_registry (cl DB). Build IMO layers: input (capture from Neon), middle/detection.py (T1/T2 comparison engine), output (signal emission + movement logging). Build run.py runner. Hub scaffold exists (manifest, PRD, hub_status.py). Python, not TypeScript. Zero external HTTP calls. CRITICAL: PRD conflict must be resolved first — PRD says sensor-only, BAR-50 ticket says cascade enrichment. Recommend sensor-only (Option B). Supersedes v1 packet (wrong repo context).

CROSS_REPO: Signal category migration targets cl database (lcs.signal_registry, lcs.signal_queue constraint). Planner must determine separate WORK_PACKET or inline.
cross_repo_note: Signal queue/registry constraint updates target cl database. Planner decides routing.
